What does a Himalayan salt wall do?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Wall Therapy: 5 Key Benefits for Wellness
expanded_element.description: Himalayan salt walls are touted for their air-purifying qualities. The negative ions released help neutralize allergens, dust, and pollutants in the air, acting like a natural, beautiful air filter.

items.title: What are the four ingredients in the pink salt trick?
How long do salt walls last?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Bricks: The Best Upgrade for Your Sauna
expanded_element.description: If you keep it dry, a Himalayan salt wall can technically last forever since salt is a mineral that doesn't rot or decay.

items.title: How long do Himalayan salt blocks last?

expanded_element.title: How Long Does A Himalayan Salt Block Last - Saltpur
expanded_element.description: Himalayan salt blocks can last for years, but it is important to take care of them properly. If the salt block is not properly sealed, it can become brittle and break. It is also important to keep the salt block dry, as moisture can cause it to deteriorate.
